zh.lifeSummary: 當Nils Henriksson於1570年出生在瑞典諾波頓波利利斯布時，他的父親Henrick Persson25歲，母親Anna Nilsdotter21歲。他於1617年與Ingrid Gudbrandsdotter在瑞典諾波頓內德爾卡利可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他於1570年住在瑞典諾波頓卡利可且於1665年住在瑞典諾波頓內德爾卡利可。他於1535年被列為nämndeman。他去世於1665年10月29日在瑞典諾波頓波利利斯布享年95歲，埋葬在瑞典諾波頓內德爾卡利可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nils Henriksson于1570年出生在瑞典諾波頓波利利斯布时，他的父亲Henrick Persson25岁，母亲Anna Nilsdotter21岁。他于1617年与Ingrid Gudbrandsdotter在瑞典諾波頓內德爾卡利可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他于1570年住在瑞典諾波頓卡利可且于1665年住在瑞典諾波頓內德爾卡利可。他于1535年被列为nämndeman。他去世于1665年10月29日在瑞典諾波頓波利利斯布享年95岁，埋葬在瑞典諾波頓內德爾卡利可。

nameMeanings.name: Henriksson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Bertel, Lars, Sig, Thor.

Americanized form (and a rare Swedish variant) of Swedish Henriksson: patronymic from the personal name Henrik (see Henry 1). This is also an Americanized form of the Norwegian and Danish cognate Henriksen . Compare Hendrickson and Henrickson .

variants.name: Hendrickson
meanings: Americanized form of Swedish Henriksson (see Henrikson ), Danish, Norwegian, and North German Henriksen or Henrichsen , and Dutch, North German, and Danish Hendriksen . Compare Hendrixson and Henrickson .

English (eastern): patronymic from the personal name Hendrick + -son. This form of the surname appears to be a 16th- or 17th-century importation to Britain from the Netherlands, and was reinforced in the 20th century.

variants.name: Henrickson
meanings: Americanized form of Swedish patronymic Henriksson (see Henrikson ) or of its Danish, Norwegian, and North German cognates (see Henricksen ). Compare Hendrickson .

variants.name: Henry
meanings: English, French, Walloon, and West Indian (mainly Jamaica and Haiti): from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements haim, heim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’, introduced to England by the Normans in the form Henri. During the Middle Ages this name became enormously popular in England and was borne by eight kings. Continental forms of the personal name were equally popular throughout Europe. In the period in which the majority of English surnames were formed, a common English vernacular form of the name was Harry, hence the surnames Harris (southern) and Harrison (northern). Official documents of the period normally used the Latinized form Henricus. In medieval times, English Henry absorbed an originally distinct Old English personal name that had hagan ‘hawthorn’ (compare Hain 2) as its first element, and there has also been confusion with Amery. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. German Heinrich , and also their derivatives, e.g. Swedish Henriksson (see Henrikson ). Compare Henri .
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hInnéirghe ‘descendant of Innéirghe’, a byname based on éirghe ‘arising’.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Éinrí or Mac Einri, patronymics from the personal names Éinrí, Einri, Irish forms of Henry. It is also found as a variant of McEnery .

nameMeanings.name: Nils
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Nicholas
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

historicEvents.description: Peace of Stettin concluded. Denmark recognized independence of Sweden. Sweden gave up claim to Norway.
Treaty of Stolbovo ended Swedish occupation of Northern Russia.
1618-1648 Sweden fights in the Thirty Years' War.
Swedish warship Vasa sank in Stockholm harbor. 25 drowned.

historicEvents.title: The Thirty Years' War
historicEvents.description: King Gustavus Adolphus entered Sweden into the Thirty Years' War in 1630 with great success on the side of the German Protestants.
Queen Christina abdicated throne. Converted to Catholicism, later buried in Rome in St. Peter's.

en.lifeSummary: When Nils Henriksson was born in 1570, in Börjelsbyn, Norrbotten, Sweden, his father, Henrick Persson, was 25 and his mother, Anna Nilsdotter, was 21. He married Ingrid Gudbrandsdotter in 1617, in Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Sweden. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He lived in Kalix, Norrbotten, Sweden in 1570 and Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Sweden in 1665. In 1535, his occupation is listed as nämndeman. He died on 29 October 1665, in Börjelsbyn, Norrbotten, Sweden, at the age of 95, and was buried in Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Sweden.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nils Henriksson est né en 1570, à Börjelsbyn, Norrbotten, Suède, son père, Henrick Persson, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Anna Nilsdotter, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Ingrid Gudbrandsdotter en 1617, à Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Suède. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il a vécu à Kalix, Norrbotten, Suède en 1570 et à Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Suède en 1665. En 1535, sa profession de son indiquée est nämndeman. Il est décédé le 29 octobre 1665, à Börjelsbyn, Norrbotten, Suède, à l’âge de 95 ans, et a été enterré à Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Suède.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nils Henriksson 1570 in Börjelsbyn, Norrbotten, Schweden geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henrick Persson 25 und seine Mutter Anna Nilsdotter 21. Er hat 1617 in Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Schweden Ingrid Gudbrandsdotter geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. 1570 hat er in Kalix, Norrbotten, Schweden und 1665 in Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Schweden gelebt. 1535 ist sein Beruf als nämndeman aufgeführt. Er starb am 29. Oktober 1665 im Alter von 95 Jahren in Börjelsbyn, Norrbotten, Schweden und wurde in Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Schweden begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nils Henriksson è nato il nel 1570 nel Börjelsbyn, Norrbotten, Svezia, il suo padre, Henrick Persson, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Anna Nilsdotter, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Ingrid Gudbrandsdotter nel 1617, nel Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Svezia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Vissuto a Kalix, Norrbotten, Svezia nel 1570 e nel Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Svezia nel 1665. Nel 1535, la sua occupazione è indicata come nämndeman. Morì il 29 ottobre 1665, nel Börjelsbyn, Norrbotten, Svezia, all'età di 95 anni, e fu sepolto a Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Svezia.

ja.lifeSummary: Nils Henrikssonが1570年にスウェーデンノルボッテンブoルジェルスブインで生まれた時，父Henrick Perssonは25歳，母Anna Nilsdotterは21歳であった。1617年にスウェーデンノルボッテンネデルカリックスでIngrid Gudbrandsdotterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1570年にはスウェーデンノルボッテンカリックスに，1665年にはスウェーデンノルボッテンネデルカリックスに住んでいた。1535年，職業はnämndemanと記録されている。彼は1665年10月29日にスウェーデンノルボッテンブoルジェルスブインで95歳で死去し，スウェーデンノルボッテンネデルカリックスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Nils Henriksson(이)가 1570년 스웨덴 노르벗텐 브o르j스빈에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henrick Persson(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Anna Nilsdotter(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1617년 스웨덴 노르벗텐 네더캘릭스에서 Ingrid Gudbrandsdotter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 1570년도에 스웨덴 노르벗텐 캘릭스에서, 1665년도에 스웨덴 노르벗텐 네더캘릭스에서 살았다. 1535년, 그의 직업은 nämndeman이었다. 그는 1665년 10월 29일 스웨덴 노르벗텐 브o르j스빈에서 95세의 나이로 사망했으며 스웨덴 노르벗텐 네더캘릭스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nils Henriksson nasceu em 1570, em Börjelsbyn, Norrbotten, Suécia, seu pai, Henrick Persson, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Anna Nilsdotter, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Ingrid Gudbrandsdotter em 1617, em Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Suécia. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele viveu em Kalix, Norrbotten, Suécia em 1570 e em Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Suécia em 1665. Em 1535, sua profissão aparece como nämndeman. Ele faleceu em 29 de outubro de 1665, em Börjelsbyn, Norrbotten, Suécia, com 95 anos, e foi sepultado em Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Suécia.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nils Henriksson родился в 1570 г. в местности бoрджелсбин, норрботтен, Швеция, его отцу по имени Henrick Persson было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Anna Nilsdotter, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Ingrid Gudbrandsdotter в 1617 г. в местности недиркаликс, норрботтен, Швеция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он жил в местности каликс, норрботтен, Швеция в 1570 году и в местности недиркаликс, норрботтен, Швеция в 1665 году. В 1535 году он работал по профессии nämndeman. Он умер 29 октября 1665 г. в местности бoрджелсбин, норрботтен, Швеция в возрасте 95 лет и был похоронен в местности недиркаликс, норрботтен, Швеция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nils Henriksson nació en 1570, en Börjelsbyn, Norrbotten, Suecia, su papá, Henrick Persson, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Anna Nilsdotter, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Ingrid Gudbrandsdotter en 1617, en Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Suecia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Vivió en Kalix, Norrbotten, Suecia en 1570 y en Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Suecia en 1665. En 1535, su ocupación registrada era nämndeman. Murió el 29 de octubre de 1665, en Börjelsbyn, Norrbotten, Suecia, a la edad de 95 años, y fue sepultado en Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Suecia.
